docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF AGUILAR, GLENDA AS TO DEFENDANT MEZYNSKI, CHRISTOPHER R AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUILAR, GLENDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEZYNSKI, CHRISTOPHER R AN INDIVIDUAL $36,624.00 PRINCIPAL, $8,346.22 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $45,405.22, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
